title: Swiss Modernism Persona Poster AI
sourceTitle: Swiss Modernism Persona Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Complex Swiss Modernism collage poster for MAYA VOLT, built around cybersecurity researcher persona with neon cyan accent color, CYBER DEFENSE ARCHITECT, and ZERO-DAY HUNTER / 98% ACCURACY / 42 SYSTEMS SECURED. Subject: MAYA VOLT appears as the central persona across a large high-grain portrait, a cropped eye or signature-detail close-up, and a seated podium portrait with relaxed commanding presence. Scene: cybersecurity researcher persona with neon cyan accent color informs the portrait attitude, accent color, symbolic details, stats, and professional context while the poster remains a clean editorial design object. Composition: Fixed single vertical poster with overlapping geometric frames: large top-left portrait, center-right cropped detail rectangle, bottom-center seated podium portrait, light gray grainy background, outlined initials in opposite corners, center vertical accent ribbon, bottom-left data block, and scattered squares, dotted circles, and asterisks. Signature Elements: The poster must feel analytically designed around MAYA VOLT: persona-specific symbols, stats, initials, accent color, portrait fragments, data hierarchy, and Swiss grid discipline all reinforce one coherent persona. Style: High-end Swiss Modernism editorial collage merging hyper-realistic photography, flat vector geometry, risograph or halftone processing, heavy gritty film grain, magazine-print texture, and disciplined modernist hierarchy. Color Palette: Fixed light gray grain base, black typography, grayscale or restrained color portraits, orange and black geometric accents, and one signature accent color implied by cybersecurity researcher persona with neon cyan accent color. Lighting: Professional studio portrait lighting processed through gritty magazine print, halftone grain, and strong modernist contrast. Typography: Use large outlined initials MV in opposite corners, a solid vertical ribbon reading CYBER DEFENSE ARCHITECT, bold sans-serif data text for ZERO-DAY HUNTER / 98% ACCURACY / 42 SYSTEMS SECURED, and short structured labels only. Restrictions: Keep the vertical poster coherent, preserve readable initials and data blocks, use intentional typography only, maintain strong grid hierarchy, and keep all portrait fragments tied to one persona.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Restrictions: Keep the vertical poster coherent, preserve readable initials and data blocks, use intentional typography only, maintain strong grid hierarchy, and keep all portrait fragments tied to one persona.
